item.name: Prototype Tomestone
item.description: Garlond Ironworks engineers believe this device to be an attempt by Allagan scientists to increase tomestone capacity, while keeping overall size relatively small. This may have become the next standard in tomestone data storage...had not their civilization been inconveniently wiped from the realm. This particular variety is not as highly sought as it once was, and may no longer be exchanged for other wares.
